headline_readiness.claim_note: Headline may be geometry-heldout decision quality only; report metrics where the recommended method loses.
headline_readiness.criterion: one method leads or ties at least three geometry-heldout decision metrics

geometry_heldout.confidence_method: mean, sample standard deviation, standard error, normal 95% CI

map_completion.confidence_method: mean, sample standard deviation, standard error, normal 95% CI
